emails.body: You put a deal in for Torch for this time frame at this meter to clear an exception. Should we put a new deal in with Cleco? Let me know. Mary Forwarded by Mary Poorman/NA/Enron on 01/31/2001 04:45 PM Charlene Richmond@ECT 01/31/2001 04:04 PM

emails.subject: Re: Meter 986315 for 10/00
emails.body: Re: Meter 986315 for 10/00 I don't know if they paid Torch, I would assume so, as this is October. According to Charlene, Cleco is invoicing us for this deal. Intially, there was no deal in the system at all.
